exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your medical treatment forward
items: Create a communication plan with your healthcare team including preferred contact methods and emergency protocols
Schedule a family meeting to discuss your treatment plan, care needs, and how loved ones can best support you
Create a daily check-in routine with your primary caregiver or support person to discuss symptoms, concerns, and daily needs
Practice explaining your medical condition and treatment plan in simple terms to prepare for conversations with friends and colleagues
Write and share a medical information card with emergency contacts that includes your key medical details for situations when you cannot communicate
Set up a group text or communication channel with your closest support network to share treatment updates and coordinate help
